meaning: n.(书的)左页,(书的)封底,反面
examples: Verso can be used to practice vocabulary.
Please note that the verso of the card has to be white.
I prodotti esportati verso il Nord America, Europa, Asia e altri paesi e region i.
En general, el cantor principal recita el primer verso y el segundo grupo le responde.
In "Verso (Starry Night)" (2008), Mr. Muniz cobbles together an object picture frame, stretcher cradle, protective backing, labels, inventory number, and hardware for hanging.
